meta.description: Pure source-based tiering for standalone prod replacement. Divergence is informational only.

tierDefinitions.A: cost: PLI+city_adj   rent: market(Airbnb)|drift(NBS)     OR   cost: PLI only + rent: official
tierDefinitions.B: cost: PLI+city_adj   rent: formula                        OR   cost: PLI only + rent: market/drift
